title: The Case for Israel: Democracy's Outpost
original_title: The Case for Israel: Democracy's Outpost
overview: Rising in vigorous defense of the nation-state of the Jewish people, distinguished Harvard Law School professor Alan Dershowitz presents incisive evidence from leading experts across the political spectrum to assert Israel's basic right to exist.
